reason: Adding the nosuid option to /home is a filesystem mount option change, which per policy is considered too dangerous to remediate automatically because it may affect system behavior and could potentially break applications or services that rely on setuid programs in /home. Therefore, it requires manual review.
estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Potential loss of setuid program functionality in /home; Possible impact on applications that rely on setuid binaries in /home; Risk of unintended side effects on system behavior
